message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceParticipant underline false
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor Actor

participant "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension
participant "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension
participant "«Analysis»\nConditionalFormattingCellPanel" as ConditionalFormattingCellPanel

Actor -> UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension : starts use case
UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension -> UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension : create()
UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension -> ConditionalFormattingCellPanel : create()
ConditionalFormattingCellPanel -> Actor : shows side bar

@enduml
